data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for escalation for unsupported or risky cases. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate how the system handles such escalations, nor does it provide concrete examples of the entities or endpoints involved in this process. The linked use case mentions escalation but lacks detailed evidence of its implementation, leading to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of specific mechanisms or endpoints for escalating unsupported or risky cases.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define escalation process for unsupported cases
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system can escalate cases that are unsupported or deemed risky.
